articles.headline: Viktor Orbán concedes with Hungarian opposition on course for landslide election win
articles.description: Viktor Orbán has conceded in a speech to supporters, telling them: "The result of the election is clear and painful."

articles.headline: Hungary election: Early results show Magyar’s Tisza ahead of Orban’s Fidesz
articles.description: Longtime Prime Minister Viktor Orban has conceded defeat in the country’s parliamentary election.

articles.headline: Home Minister directs security agencies to act firmly against drug-related crimes
articles.description: KATHMANDU: Home Minister Sudan Gurung has directed security agencies to take strict action to control drug-related and other criminal activities. During a meeting with district security chiefs at the Nepal Police Academy in Bharatpur on Sunday, Gurung instruc…

articles.headline: The AI revolution threatens office jobs, but revives demand for skilled trades
articles.description: AI threatens white-collar jobs more than blue-collar trades, highlighting an urgent need to realign education with workforce demands in America.

articles.headline: 2027: Interior minister urges support for Tinubu’s re-election
articles.description:
The Minister of Interior, Olubunmi Tunji-Ojo, has urged Nigerians to continue supporting President Bola Tinubu beyond 2027 to ensure policy continuity and sustained development.
The post 2027: Interior minister urges support for Tinubu’s re-election appeared …
